{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211428393114D981A2E979D0E0BE"}"},"total":1887},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7528417257384297240","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常非常好看的一本书，在推理破案这方面来说的话已经可以和市面上比较出名的七宗罪相比了，无论是对剧情的描述还是案件的紧迫感。所呈现给我的已经和七宗罪没什么差别了，非常推荐看的一本推理类小说","text_exts":[{"e":39,"s":36,"text":"七宗罪","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%83%E5%AE%97%E7%BD%AA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407451979D0E0BE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227528417257384297240%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227446236898084801560%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%83%E5%AE%97%E7%BD%AA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752849031,"group_id":"7446236898084801560","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7llbuF8LBD83vMUQuWfDEn4Dlv8KAH8rqDbJNn/R/lU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2260235847737784","user_name":"双生笑傲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2260235847737784","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7446236898084801560","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到平行世界的沈庭，开启神探系统，更成为破案聊天群的群主。

　　黑客kiko、唐探秦枫、法医秦眀、白夜神探关洪峰，甚至厨师汉尼拔，教育家竖锯，全都在群内。

　　只要侦破案件，群里不但能加入更多神探和变态杀手。

　　沈庭还能获得技能金币，兑换各种破案技能：

　　人体测量！

　　犯罪侧写！

　　弹道分析！

　　血溅形态！

　　……
